creator: massimo.giaimo@sibtonline.eu
text:
Hi Freebsd team, I'm a pfSense user. I  have a server with a Realtek 3 port network adapter (http://atacom.com/program/print_ipc_spec.cgi?Item_code=IMDB_JETA_1N_3R). This adapter work correctly in 2.1 pfSense Release (FreeBSD 8.3), but it is not recognized in 2.3 pfSense Release (FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p3). Support for this device was deliberately eliminated?

I opened a post in pfSense forum and a user (kpa) told me this:

I'm almost 100% sure that:

A) The adapter was supported by the re(4) driver.

B) The reason the adapter no longer works is a regression in the re(4) driver and needs to be reported to FreeBSD devs working on the driver.

Any help will be appreciated!

Thank you!
